name: Jet Lag: The Game
overview: Jet Lag: The Game is a travel competition show where instead of traveling to the competitions, travel is the competition. Each season brings a new game where the world is the board, with players competing against each other, sleep deprivation, flight delays, broken-down cars, and the bizarre challenges they quickly regret having created.

trailers.title: Jet Lag: The Game - A New Channel by Wendover Productions
